replies.author: @vickyedits1101
replies.text: Israel = a person (Jacob). “Palestine never existed” is one of the most recycled Zionist genocidal slogans, yet: The name Palestine / Philistia / Peleset is attested in Egyptian, Assyrian, Greek, and Roman records. Herodotus, the Greek historian from the 5th century BCE, explicitly mentions Palestine. The Romans did not invent the word out of thin air, they inherited and Latinized an already ancient regional name.
